MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

No other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Judgment Debtor's Claim Of Exemption is granted, except for $100 per pay period. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
